Package javadraw.internal

Interface Resizable2DInterface

All Superinterfaces:
Drawable2DInterface, DrawableInterface, LocatableInterface
All Known Implementing Classes:
FilledArc, FilledOval, FilledPolygon, FilledRect, FilledRoundedRect, FramedArc, FramedOval, FramedPolygon, FramedRect, FramedRoundedRect, ObjectDrawPolygon, ObjectDrawRectangularShape, Triangle, VisibleImage
public interface Resizable2DInterface extends Drawable2DInterface
